title: 10 health benefits of Mandragora officinarum (mandrake)
intro: Mandragora officinarum has health benefits such as relieving anxiety and insomnia due to its sedative and analgesic properties. Its alkaloids, including scopolamine and atropine, have antispasmodic effects that can ease digestive issues like colitis and irritable bowel syndrome. This natural remedy can improve sleep quality, reducing stress and promoting relaxation, allowing individuals to wake up feeling refreshed and revitalized.
